label: PASS
rationale: Before reset the re-encryption state was ACTIVE and ContOnReset was empty. The cited ContOnReset rule says an empty set stops on any reset and sets ReEncryptState to PAUSED; gen_status value 34 is active_reset_stop_detect for a reset stop when the last state was ACTIVE.

label: FAIL
rationale: Before reset the re-encryption state was ACTIVE and ContOnReset was empty, so the reset should set ReEncryptState to PAUSED with active_reset_stop_detect status 34. Returning ACTIVE with GeneralStatus 0 does not match the cited reset-stop behavior.

label: PASS
rationale: Before reset the re-encryption state was PENDING and ContOnReset was empty. The cited ContOnReset rule requires PAUSED after any reset, and gen_status value 5 is pend_reset_stop_detect for a reset stop when the last state was PENDING.

label: FAIL
rationale: Before reset the re-encryption state was PENDING and ContOnReset was empty, so the reset should stop re-encryption, set PAUSED, and report pend_reset_stop_detect status 5. Returning PENDING with GeneralStatus 0 is not compliant with the cited rules.
